zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphine於1384年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安可斯東普時，他的父親Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphine99歲，母親Agnes Margaret Dundas90歲。他和Jean Sinclair of Orkney至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1454年9月15日在蘇格蘭艾丁波享年70歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphine于1384年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安可斯東普时，他的父亲Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphine99岁，母亲Agnes Margaret Dundas90岁。他和Jean Sinclair of Orkney至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1454年9月15日在苏格兰艾丁波享年70岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰艾丁波。

nameMeanings.name: Forrester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English forester ‘officer in charge of a forest or lord's hunting ground’ (Old French forestier, Anglo-Norman forester). See Forrest .

variants.name: Forrest
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived in or near a royal forest, or a metonymic occupational name for a keeper or worker in one. Middle English forest was not, as today, a near-synonym of wood, but referred specifically to a large area of woodland reserved by law for the purposes of hunting by the king and his nobles. The same applied to the European cognates, both ancient Germanic and Romance. The English word is from Middle English forest ‘forest’, Old French forest, Late Latin forestis (silva). This is generally taken to be a derivative of foris ‘outside’; the reference was probably to woods lying outside a settlement. On the other hand, Middle High German for(e)st has been held to be a derivative of Old High German foraha ‘fir’ (see Forster ), with the addition of a collective suffix.
Irish: this name is also frequently attested in Ireland, where it may be a variant of   Forrestal  .

variants.name: Forester
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Forrester   (see   Forrest  ).

variants.name: Forrister
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Forrester  .

variants.name: Forster
meanings: English: shortened form of   Forrester  , an occupational name for someone who worked in a forest.
English: possibly a Norman French nickname or occupational name from Old French forcetier ‘maker of scissors or shears, cutler’. Compare Force and Forse .

German (mainly Förster): agent derivative of Middle High German forst ‘forest’, denoting someone who lived in or near a royal forest, or who worked in one (see Forst ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Foerster .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphine was born in 1384, in Corstorphine, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphine, was 99 and his mother, Agnes Margaret Dundas, was 90. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Jean Sinclair of Orkney. He died on 15 September 1454, in Edinburgh, Scotland, at the age of 70, and was buried in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphine est né en 1384, à Corstorphine, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphine, avait 99 ans et sa mère, Agnes Margaret Dundas, avait 90 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Jean Sinclair of Orkney. Il est décédé le 15 septembre 1454, à Edinburgh, Écosse, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphine 1384 in Corstorphine, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphine 99 und seine Mutter Agnes Margaret Dundas 90. Er hatte mit Jean Sinclair of Orkney mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. September 1454 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Edinburgh, Scotland und wurde in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphine è nato il nel 1384 nel Corstorphine, Midlothian, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphine, aveva 99 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Margaret Dundas, aveva 90 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Jean Sinclair of Orkney. Morì il 15 settembre 1454, nel Edinburgh, Scotland, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphineが1384年にスコットランドミドロスアンコルストルフィンで生まれた時，父Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphineは99歳，母Agnes Margaret Dundasは90歳であった。彼はJean Sinclair of Orkneyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1454年9月15日にスコットランドエディンブルグで70歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエディンブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphine(이)가 1384년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 코르스토르필인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphine(은)는 99세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Margaret Dundas(은)는 90세였다. 그는 Jean Sinclair of Orkney(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1454년 9월 15일 스컷랜드 에딘버그에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphine nasceu em 1384, em Corstorphine, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphine, tinha 99 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Margaret Dundas, tinha 90 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Jean Sinclair of Orkney. Ele faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1454, em Edinburgh, Scotland, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphine родился в 1384 г. в местности корсторфаин, мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphine было 99 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Margaret Dundas, 90. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Jean Sinclair of Orkney. Он умер 15 сентября 1454 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Forrester 2nd of Corstorphine nació en 1384, en Corstorphine, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, Sir Adam Forrester - Laird of Corstorphine, tenía 99 años y su mamá, Agnes Margaret Dundas, tenía 90 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Jean Sinclair of Orkney. Murió el 15 de septiembre de 1454, en Edinburgh, Scotland, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido.
